governing_law.value: Laws of the United States of America
governing_law.exact_text: This Agreement shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the United States of America.

audit_rights.value: plan_b shall bear the cost of the audit and shall in any event immediately pay to LICENSOR the full value of the underpaid or under-reported fees.
audit_rights.exact_text: payments for the period covered by the audit, plan_b shall bear the cost of the audit and shall in any event immediately pay to LICENSOR the full value of the underpaid or under-reported fees. Such audits shall normally be conducted during normal business hours at plan_b's premises.
